children.text: any right to sell, grant, lease, convey, encumber, or exchange land or any interest in land in the Area (and any such conveyance shall not have validity in law or equity);
any exemption from applicable Federal wildlife protection laws;
any right to engage in a use prohibited by ; orsection 539m–2(e) of this title
any right to exclude persons or governmental entities from the Area.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: No person who exercises traditional or cultural use rights as authorized by may be prosecuted for a Federal wildlife offense requiring proof of a violation of a State law (including regulations).section 539m–3(a)(4) of this title
